label: Simple financial help — ComCare
client_situation: Single mother of two young children, recently lost her job, needs financial help to pay rent and utilities.
notes: ComCare suite + SkillsFuture Jobseeker Support + MUIS Zakat are all valid entry points.

label: Healthcare subsidies — CHAS / MediFund
client_situation: Senior with chronic conditions who can't afford regular GP visits and medications.
notes: Healthcare affordability — CHAS subsidies, MediFund, plus premium-subsidy schemes.

label: Caregiver of dementia parent
client_situation: Working adult caring for elderly parent with mid-stage dementia. Looking for daytime help so they can continue working.
notes: Dementia respite — formal day care + home-based caregiving + caregiver support + Take-a-Break.

label: Disability — assistive technology
client_situation: Young adult with cerebral palsy needs a powered wheelchair to be more independent at home and work.
notes: ATF is the headline; PWD employment/transport schemes and Enabled Living Programme also valid.

label: Teen suicide warning signs
client_situation: Teenager showing suicide warning signs after recent breakup, family is panicked and doesn't know what to do.
notes: SOS family + youth-focused mental health + outreach + Local Outreach to Suicide Survivors.

label: Family in crisis — FSC + counselling
client_situation: Couple in conflict, two school-aged children showing emotional distress, family relationships are deteriorating.
notes: FSC + Family Strengthening + Counselling + MightyKids Family + Maintenance Support.

label: Low-income family with young child — KidSTART
client_situation: Low-income family with a 3-year-old; mother concerned about child's early development, lives in Yishun.
notes: KidSTART for early development + childcare subsidies + Baby Support Grant + Baby Bonus.

label: Housing — rental + grant for young couple
client_situation: Young couple expecting their first child, looking to apply for their first HDB flat with limited savings.
notes: CPF housing grants + enhanced grant + priority schemes for first-timer parents.

label: Senior — silver care continuum
client_situation: 82-year-old widower living alone, mobility declining, daughter lives overseas. He's frail but mentally clear.
notes: Wide spread of senior services — AAC + financial + mobility + home care/meals/therapy/transport.

label: Complex multi-need (Least-to-Most stress test)
client_situation: A 58-year-old single mother is the primary caregiver for her 82-year-old mother with mid-stage dementia. She also has an autistic teenage son currently struggling in mainstream school. She recently had to cut her work hours to half-time. The family is starting to fall behind on utility bills.
notes: Stress-tests the decomposer; pure retrieval (whole-paragraph embedding) won't surface SPED items — that requires the decomposer + multi-retrieval merge via recommend().
